name: Gemdale Corporation
summary: Gemdale Corporation engages in real estate business in China and internationally. The company engages in development, sale, and operation of residential and commercial properties, such as apartments, boutique residences, office buildings, commercial complexes, industrial parks, hotels, etc. It also engages in real estate financing; sports industry cluster operations, with a focus on tennis; property services and community operations; and provision of decoration products and services for residences. In addition, it offers agent construction services; and operates as K12 private bilingual international school. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
